content:
The link provided (https://support.google.com/mail/answer/69585) offers general help but doesn't actually include technical details. Maybe the limit has been reached?

image.png
That's sad... if this was caused by a spam filter, the only thing I can do is adjust the commit message (or even the patch?) while guessing Gmail's internal spam filtering logic
let me try one more time tomorrow... hopefully this was just a rate limit issue

One workaround might be to use web endpoint with b4:
https://b4.docs.kernel.org/en/latest/contributor/send.html#authenticating-with-the-web-submission-endpoint

I do not know if web endpoint could be used without b4 though.

Kari Argillander said:

One workaround might be to use web endpoint with b4:
https://b4.docs.kernel.org/en/latest/contributor/send.html#authenticating-with-the-web-submission-endpoint

I do not know if web endpoint could be used without b4 though.

Oh this seems cool. I should try this if the same thing happens again tomorrow. Thanks!
